name: iapv_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW iapv_view AS SELECT dpd.player, dpd.match_outcome, dpd.wickets, dpd.runs, (dps.total_runs / dps.matches_played_as_batter) AS batting_impact, bps.total_wickets_taken AS bowling_impact FROM detailed_player_data dpd JOIN batter_player_stats dps ON dpd.player = dps.player_name JOIN bowler_player_stats bps ON dpd.player = bps.player_name JOIN match_summary ms ON dpd.match_id = ms.match_id

name: impv_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW impv_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view

name: impvs_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW impvs_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view

name: impdv_view
SQL: CREATE VIEW impdv_view AS SELECT * FROM iapv_view
